tracemalloc/Filter/all_frames.name: all_frames
tracemalloc/Filter/all_frames.description: If all_frames is True, all frames of the traceback are checked. If all_frames is False, only the most recent frame is checked. This attribute has no effect if the traceback limit is 1. See the get_traceback_limit() function and Snapshot.traceback_limit attribute.
